skill_availability_goal: Verifies that feature-catalog reuses the existing parent PRD feature_path, nests the refund capability as a child feature, and emits a complete handoff packet.
prompt: 我们接手维护这个项目，docs/pm 里已经有 order-management 的 PRD。代码里最近多了退款模块，帮我做功能画像并更新功能目录，确定退款功能的 feature_path，说明确认后下一步怎么走。
